data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of all available fact categories that can be used to filter or retrieve facts. This operation helps AI agents discover what category options are supported by the API. No parameters required. Returns an array of category names/identifiers.
data.reasoning: Original description is misleading - it says 'Get a random Fact' but the endpoint path suggests it retrieves categories, not a random fact. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what categories are, what the operation returns, and its purpose. data.current_description: Get a random fact about a number
data.description_suggestion: Returns a random interesting fact about a number. Optionally accepts a specific number as input; if not provided, a random number is selected. Returns a fact object containing the number and its associated interesting fact. Useful for discovering numerical trivia and mathematical curiosities.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and doesn't explain input parameters or output structure. Doesn't clarify whether a number parameter is required or optional. Added details about parameter optionality, return structure, and use case context for AI agents to better understand when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) person born on a given day and month
data.summary_suggestion: Get famous person born on date
data.description_suggestion: Returns a random famous or relatively famous person born on a specified day and month. Requires day and month parameters (year is not required). Returns a person object containing name, birth date, and biographical information. Useful for historical lookups and discovering notable births on specific calendar dates.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about required parameters (day and month format), doesn't explain the return structure, and uses informal language with parentheses. Added parameter requirements, return object details, and use case context for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get a Fact belonging to the id.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific fact entry by its unique identifier. Supports both public random facts and private user-stored facts. Returns the complete fact object including content, category, and metadata. Requires the fact ID as a path or query parameter.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is too vague - doesn't clarify which ID parameter is required, doesn't explain the dual nature (public/private facts), and lacks output details. data.current_description: Add a Fact entry to the database (private collection).
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new private fact entry
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new fact entry in the user's private collection. Requires authentication. Accepts fact content, category, subcategory, and optional metadata as input parameters. Returns the newly created fact object with assigned ID and timestamp. The fact is immediately stored and accessible only to the authenticated user.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks detail about required parameters, authentication requirement, return value, and access control implications. Added specifics about input parameters, authentication, response structure, and privacy/ownership context for AI agents to understand the operation's full scope.

message: Operation 'delete_/fact' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify authentication requirement, doesn't clarify that this is for private facts only, lacks output details, and doesn't explain the permanent nature of deletion. Added authentication context, ownership verification, return value, and side effects for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Delete a Fact entry identified by the id.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a fact entry from the user's private collection by its unique identifier. Requires authentication and ownership of the fact. Returns a confirmation response. The deleted fact cannot be recovered. Only affects the authenticated user's private collection.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify authentication requirement, doesn't clarify that this is for private facts only, lacks output details, and doesn't explain the permanent nature of deletion. Added authentication context, ownership verification, return value, and side effects for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get_/fact/fod' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity on parameter requirements (is category required?), doesn't explain the daily refresh behavior, and missing output details. Added specifics about parameter requirements, daily refresh mechanism, return value structure, and consistency behavior to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get fact of the day for the given category.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the fact of the day for a specified category. Returns a single fact that is refreshed daily. Accepts category as a required parameter. Returns the fact object with content, category, and publication date. The same fact is returned for all requests on the same day within the same category.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity on parameter requirements (is category required?), doesn't explain the daily refresh behavior, and missing output details. Added specifics about parameter requirements, daily refresh mechanism, return value structure, and consistency behavior to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'get_/fact/random' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description uses unclear notation '(optional)' instead of clearly stating parameter optionality. Lacks output details and doesn't explain the randomization behavior. Improved clarity on optional parameters, added return value details, and explained that each call returns different results for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get a random Fact for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a random fact, optionally filtered by category and subcategory. Both category and subcategory parameters are optional - if omitted, a fact from any category is returned. Returns a single fact object with content, category, subcategory, and metadata. Each request returns a different random fact.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description uses unclear notation '(optional)' instead of clearly stating parameter optionality. Lacks output details and doesn't explain the randomization behavior. Improved clarity on optional parameters, added return value details, and explained that each call returns different results for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Search for random Fact which has the text in the query, for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).
data.description_suggestion: Searches for facts containing specified text, with optional filtering by category and subcategory. Requires a search query parameter containing the text to match.
